main_post.text:
🔍 GeminiVRM v0.1.0 - First Release

A browser-first VRM chat powered by Gemini Live native audio. This polished fork of pixiv/ChatVRM replaces the OpenAI + Koeiromap audio pipeline with streaming Gemini Live audio.

🎯 Key Highlights:
• Streaming voice + lip sync - Avatar starts speaking before full response
• Bundled Kiyoka.vrm avatar with customization options
• YouTube Live integration - Receive comments in-app
• Local-first workflow - Just npm install & run

💡 Perfect for VTubers and live streamers who want real-time AI avatar interaction.

$ONIAGI
